entries.claim: The Assistant tab is a capability-gated primary navigation service and direct routing is blocked when CAP.agent is absent.
entries.evidence: Static APP_JS test passed during Task 1, proving Assistant is a SERVICES entry gated by cap: agent, the old System-nav button is gone, and visibleServices() drives route validation and nav rendering.

entries.claim: The Assistant stream renderer handles the full #621 typed event contract and keeps untrusted event content text-only.
entries.evidence: Static APP_JS test passed during Task 3, covering token, tool_call, tool_result, search_stage, partial_result, confirmation_required, error, and done dispatch through handleAgentEvent without direct innerHTML rendering.

entries.claim: Assistant citations are extracted only from typed source-bearing results, deduped by service/id/path, and rendered as same-origin /api/v1/view links or in-app route fallbacks.
entries.evidence: Static citation test passed during Task 4 and the Playwright smoke clicked a same-origin citation popup for /api/v1/view?account=fixture&service=mail&id=mail-1.

entries.claim: PendingAction cards keep token/action_hash out of the DOM while Confirm posts pending/token/action_hash exactly once and Cancel posts the separate turn id.
entries.evidence: Static PendingAction test passed during Task 5. The smoke JSON records no confirm before click, one confirm POST with pending/token/action_hash, one cancel POST for turn-3, and DOM exclusion of fixture token/hash sentinels.

entries.claim: The model picker is driven by /api/v1/agent/status, only switches after a successful POST, and the usage chip honestly reports unavailable when no usage exists.
entries.evidence: Static model/usage test passed during Task 6. The smoke JSON records a POST to /api/v1/agent/model?provider=claude&model=claude-opus-4 and a visible Usage unavailable chip.

entries.claim: Assistant setup and use require explicit provider-egress consent, store only a non-secret versioned consent record, and keep BYO-key setup unavailable without encrypted credential support.
entries.evidence: Static consent test passed during Task 7/8. The smoke records consent localStorage with version/accepted/provider/timestamp only, disabled setup before consent, same-origin oauth-start fixture POST, and no editable BYO secret input.

entries.claim: The deterministic Playwright smoke proves desktop/mobile Assistant visibility, stream/citation rendering, PendingAction confirm/cancel, model/usage UI, setup consent, no console/page errors, and no non-fixture-origin WebView network.
entries.evidence: agent-ui-smoke.json reports ok=true, 28 assertions, console_errors=[], page_errors=[], non_fixture_origin_requests=[], fixture404=[], and stream scenarios normal, pending-confirm, pending-cancel, and error.

entries.claim: The #622 task-level host gates passed for JavaScript syntax, smoke syntax, whitespace, and the focused consent regression after the smoke-found layout/null-rendering fixes.
entries.command: node --check gui/webui/src/app.js && node --check tools/agent-ui-smoke.mjs && git diff --check && cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-webui assistant_setup_consent_is_required_and_non_secret -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: The post-fix Task 8 verification commands passed, and screenshots were regenerated from the final smoke run.
